recommendations.title: 9 packages losing momentum
recommendations.detail: @mcptoolshop/ai-ui, @mcptoolshop/npm-launcher, @mcptoolshop/civility-kernel and 6 more show sustained decline. Consider: release updates, fix open issues, or update documentation.

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.75 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 83% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 22 packages gaining traction
recommendations.detail: @mcptoolshop/site-theme, @ai-rpg-engine/core, @mcptoolshop/xrpl-lab show organic growth with download spikes. Capitalize with blog posts, social media, or conference talks.

recommendations.title: 23 packages predicted to grow
recommendations.detail: Statistical models predict >20% growth in the next 7 days for @mcptoolshop/site-theme, @ai-rpg-engine/core, @mcptoolshop/xrpl-lab.

recommendations.title: 6 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @mcptoolshop/site-theme, @mcptoolshop/ai-ui, @mcptoolshop/repo-crawler-mcp. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 75 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: a11y-lint, file-compass, nexus-control, codebatch, nullout-mcp scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: 12 packages surging
actionableAdvice.action: Capitalize now: write a blog post, tweet, or submit to newsletters. Post a "Thank you" issue or discussion.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.75 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 83% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.

actionableAdvice.title: 3 packages with untapped potential
actionableAdvice.detail: @mcptoolshop/ai-ui, @mcptoolshop/repo-crawler-mcp, @mcptoolshop/npm-launcher have active users but stalled growth.
actionableAdvice.action: Add new features, improve docs, or create tutorials. Small efforts can shift these from D to C+ quickly.
